failures.description: The agent made an invalid ProductCatalogSearch invocation by passing product_id as 0 and omitting the required string item_id, so the catalog tool rejected the call and no price evidence was retrieved.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The agent's goal was correct: answer the price of item 1345513440 using ProductCatalogSearch. The required arguments were already available in index 1: {"item_id": "1345513440", "product_id": "1762337868"}. At index 2, the agent instead prepared ProductCatalogSearch with {"product_id": 0}, omitting item_id and changing product_id to an integer. The next step confirms this malformed invocation with an explicit SchemaError.
